Interface SecurityJpaRepository.MonitorFailedConnector

Enclosing interface:
SecurityJpaRepository
public static interface SecurityJpaRepository.MonitorFailedConnector
Projection interface for monitoring the performance of historical data connectors.

Instances represent aggregated statistics per connector, including total requests, failures, and computed failure percentage.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getConnector()
    The identifier (name or key) of the data connector.
    int
    getFailed()
    The number of attempts that failed (retry threshold exceeded).
    int
    getPercentageFailed()
    The percentage of failed attempts, rounded to the nearest whole number.
    int
    getTotal()
    The total number of connector attempts (currency-pair + security) considered.

  • Method Details

    • getConnector

      String getConnector()
      The identifier (name or key) of the data connector.
      Returns:
      the connector name

    • getTotal

      int getTotal()
      The total number of connector attempts (currency-pair + security) considered.
      Returns:
      the total attempt count

    • getFailed

      int getFailed()
      The number of attempts that failed (retry threshold exceeded).
      Returns:
      the count of failed attempts

    • getPercentageFailed

      int getPercentageFailed()
      The percentage of failed attempts, rounded to the nearest whole number.
      Returns:
      the failure rate as a percentage (0–100)
